type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The Coal Valley Mine was closed down for a significant portion of 2020 due both to Covid-19 and low coal prices. This resulted in a lower total production for the year which resulted in less waste rock and therefore lower total Arsenic releases. Both tailings and waste rock tonnes were 70% lower in 2020 than 2019.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The Coal Valley Mine was closed down for a significant portion of 2020 due both to Covid-19 and low coal prices. This resulted in a lower total production for the year which resulted in less waste rock and therefore lower total Lead releases. Both tailings and waste rock tonnes were 70% lower in 2020 than 2019.

comments.comment:
Percentages of compounds in the
tailings and wase rock are
calculated from previous sample
analysis and derived from the total
amount of refuse and tailings
